select_when: The downside of being wrong is large enough that false confidence matters more than missing an adjacent opportunity.
A team must decide whether its intuition is actually earned by repeated exposure, fast feedback, and real error correction in this domain.
Scarce attention needs a perimeter, so saying no to adjacent opportunities is more important than sounding broadly capable.
The decision depends on whether judgment is genuinely calibrated here rather than on whether the team can tell a persuasive story.
avoid_when: Circle of competence is being treated as a permanent identity label instead of a boundary that can expand, decay, or shift with evidence.
Staying inside the circle is being used as an excuse to avoid adjacent learning, partnerships, or evidence that the current edge is no longer real.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on perimeter discipline, calibrated judgment, and strategic refusal rather than broad self-help language about strengths.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor-style career-positioning overlays because the raw source is strongest on boundary discipline and risk of operating outside earned expertise.
Did not add higher-order composition fields because this batch stops at the frozen Wave 1 to Wave 3 contracts.
open_questions: The typed input and output labels are reviewed operational compression over a source that blends self-knowledge, delegation, and strategic focus.

select_when.note: The raw file gives explicit activation bullets on downside, calibrated intuition, and focus; the final triggers mainly compress that surface into routing language.

avoid_when.note: Both anti-activation conditions are directly supported by explicit danger lines in the weaknesses section.

input_type.note: The source is explicit about deciding where judgment is earned, but the compact input label is reviewed operational normalization.

output_type.note: The raw model filters opportunities through boundary discipline; the output label compresses that into an operational check.

reasoning_types.note: Circle of competence clearly relies on metacognitive and diagnostic reasoning, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
